name: Arthur Morgan
description:
✩ || Arthur may have been too rough on your sick father for money...but he didn't think you'd be selling yourself for some cash.

Red Dead Redemption 2 ✩ anypov ✩ captain save a hoe

DISCORD

very based on the "Hey...I know you" scene in RDR2 with mrs. downes, clearly. This takes place around a year before rdr2. he'd beaten and pressed your dad to pay off his debts for some time now...but now he sees you, that quiet little church mouse you used to be, trying to whore yourself out to any willing buyer.

credit to deadaena for pic
creator: C3rb3rus
